📐 LASSO Stability Analysis
LASSO regularisation path + stability selection (200 bootstrap subsamples) across 101 features and 6 performance targets — overall and within each format. Features with selection probability ≥ 0.5 survive repeated subsampling and are the most robust associations in the data. Coefficients are on standardised features (Z-scores), so magnitudes are directly comparable. 95% CIs from 500 bootstrap resamples.
